servers.name: echo-workspace
servers.description: Read, write, edit files and run git inside the ECHO repo. Tools: echo_read_file, echo_write_file, echo_edit_file, echo_append_file, echo_list_files, echo_git, echo_validate_python.

servers.name: bash
servers.description: Execute bash commands with timeout and safety guards. cwd defaults to ECHO repo root.

servers.name: datetime
servers.description: Current date and time tools. Tools: get_current_datetime, get_current_date. Supports IANA timezone parameter.

servers.name: opencode-mcp
servers.description: OpenCode SDK — AI coding tools via opencode.ai (80 tools)

servers.name: fetch
servers.description: Fetch web pages and HTTP resources

servers.name: filesystem
servers.description: Read and write local files (sandboxed to /tmp by default)

servers.name: brave_search
servers.description: Web search via Brave Search API (requires BRAVE_API_KEY env var)
